title: Dita Von Teese: Nocturnelle
full_description: Inspired by the golden age of magic, Nocturnelle blends sophisticated striptease with the art of illusion. Old-Hollywood allure, theatrical magic, and Von Teese's high-art Stripscapes — elaborate performances elevating striptease to visual poetry. A completely new repertoire, with a hand-picked cast of celebrated neo-burlesque artists, hosted by drag icon BenDeLaCreme.
ai_summary: Dita Von Teese's brand-new burlesque spectacular — themed around the golden age of magic and illusion — presents her signature Stripscapes as high-art visual poetry, hosted by BenDeLaCreme and performed by an ensemble of celebrated neo-burlesque artists.
